title: sphaeranthus crispus
intro: Sphaeranthus crispus, also known as African bird's eye or yellow bird's eye, is a flowering plant native to South Africa, characterized by its yellow or orange daisy-like flowers. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. Sphaeranthus crispus is believed to offer several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
